title: poa bulbosa subsp. nevskii
intro: Poa bulbosa subsp. nevskii, also known as Nevskii's bluegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Poa bulbosa subsp. nevskii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
